meta.purpose: Explain the two optional Claude hook events managed by prd-workflow

managed_events.UserPromptSubmit: When an active task pointer exists, detect and append qualified correction or retrospect evidence to 09-run-log.md.
managed_events.Stop: Only when current_node is Node 5, validate the existing content-gate receipt and block stale or failed delivery.

boundaries: Hook installation is optional and requires an explicit command.
The installer preserves all settings and hooks it does not own.
Hooks never create or refresh a gate receipt.
Hooks never modify PRD body or reusable Skill rules.
Inline gates remain mandatory on Codex, on Claude without hooks, and when the task pointer is inactive.
